<!-- Synthetic parser-test fixture — NOT a real agent recording (those are Story 4.3 deliverables). -->
<!-- Used by tests/lib/pf1-validation-battery.test.js Tests 6+7 to validate parseRecording. -->

## Prompt 1

Activation greeting + menu sample. Hello, this is the agent's first persona-authored response. Capability menu shown to user.

## Prompt 2

First capability invocation sample. The agent describes what it would do for the user's chosen capability.

## Prompt 3

Follow-up question sample. The agent responds to an open-ended clarifying question.

## Prompt 4

Multi-step workflow entry sample. The agent enters its deepest workflow capability and produces the first step's output.
